design_principles: Patriotic Modernity: Clean, strong lines with national colors but dominated by Professional Blue.
Action-Oriented: Every screen drives the user to the next step (Register -> Quiz -> Score).
Gamified Simplicity: The quiz should feel like a game, not a form.
Data Density (Admin): Admin panel should be dense and informative.

layout_strategies.mobile_container: max-w-md mx-auto min-h-screen flex flex-col bg-slate-50 relative overflow-hidden
layout_strategies.quiz_container: flex-1 flex flex-col justify-center p-6 gap-6

buttons.primary: bg-primary text-white hover:bg-primary/90 shadow-lg hover:shadow-xl transition-all duration-300 font-heading uppercase tracking-wide text-lg py-6 rounded-xl
buttons.secondary: bg-white text-primary border-2 border-primary/20 hover:border-primary hover:bg-blue-50 transition-all font-heading uppercase tracking-wide
buttons.option: w-full text-left p-4 rounded-xl border-2 border-slate-100 hover:border-primary/50 hover:bg-blue-50 transition-all font-body font-medium text-lg relative group

inputs.default: h-12 bg-white border-slate-200 focus:border-primary focus:ring-primary/20 rounded-lg font-body

cards.quiz: bg-white rounded-2xl shadow-xl p-6 border border-slate-100
cards.stat: bg-white rounded-xl shadow-sm p-6 border border-slate-100 flex flex-col gap-2

flag_texture.desc: Blue sky with flag elements for subtle backgrounds

hero_crowd.desc: Crowd in yellow/green, patriotic vibe for landing page hero

instructions_to_main_agent: UPDATE tailwind.config.js to include the custom colors and fonts defined above.
CREATE a 'Layout' component that handles the mobile-centered view for public users and full-width for admin.
USE 'Barlow Condensed' for all headings to give that political campaign poster look.
ENSURE the Quiz flow feels fast: use AnimatePresence for transitions between questions.
ADMIN PANEL: Must be protected. Use a simple hardcoded login or mock auth for now if backend isn't ready, but UI must show 'Secured Access'.
DATA COLLECTION: The registration form is the most critical part. Make it clean, validate inputs in real-time.
THEME: Keep it LIGHT and CLEAN. White backgrounds, Blue text/buttons. Use the Yellow/Green only for accents (like correct answers or highlights).
DO NOT use generic gradients. Use flat colors or very subtle mesh gradients if absolutely necessary.
universal_guidelines: Don't make generic centered layouts. Use hierarchy.
Use 2-3x more spacing than typical designs.
Interactive elements must have hover/active states.
All interactive elements must have data-testid attributes.
